$meta.purpose: Machine-readable design rules for AI-driven design generation

sm.usage: Mini-badge containers, nested small UI primitives.

md.usage: Medium-sized buttons, checkbox inputs, dropdown options.

lg.usage: Standard UI components, input fields, popover select items.

xl.usage: Standard cards, navigation blocks, primary topic cards.

rules.note: Standard button uses rounded-lg for clean density. Small/xs buttons may use rounded-md or customized calculations.
All content cards use rounded-xl to soften the layout grid.
User avatars, status pills, and toggle handles are completely circular.

shadow-sm.usage: Applied to all normal dashboard cards and static panel boxes to provide a modern floating look on light mode background.

shadow-lg.usage: Applied to dropdown select list menus and popovers.

shadow-2xl.usage: Applied to the slide-over AI Drawer or floating dialogs to distinguish overlay depth.

rules.name: Flat cards in dark mode
rules.rule: Avoid using shadow-sm in dark mode; instead, cards should sit flat with an explicit border (border-border/10%) to define contrast.
